title: Cavendish and Robin Hold the Line
description: Pages 11–15 focus on cavendish and robin hold the line, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as luffy and Law break through toward the palace, while Cavendish, Kyros, and the allies hold back Doflamingo's forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The first gun- Powder Star Booster!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It will rise a little...rear booster stage detaches...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Two seconds later, the second booster will activate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The outer wrappings will fall away and the round will level...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: towards the lower left portion of the outer rampant window.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It will pass through the wall...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: will evoke trauma in its target.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: pay no heed and move on.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: What do you mean to accomplish by having me draw this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Do you intend on starting a line of dolls?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: They've arrived. Right now, they're on...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: I'm glad ...and the two of them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: The topmost floor of the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: THE PLACE OF THE DECIDING BATTLE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: I guess I oughita just hear you out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Why have you two come here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: I'm hurt... and here I was hoping it'd be for tea.

summary: Cavendish and Robin Hold the Line develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
